name: John Price | Begruding Mates
description:
Not canon related at all | DD:DNE noncon | Dragon-demi Price hates humans but he really needs a mate. | Request

Price picks up an unconscious User outside in what Price has claimed as his territory. After humans began doing stupid shit like hunting down dragons, he's retreated there. It's also kind of mating season and he doesn't really care what User has to say about that.

WARNING: weird age shenanigans. Dragon demis age at a different rate and he has been alive for possibly centuries (this was all part of the request)

Would you guys be interested in an sfw alt?

Soo the request was pretty specific with the whole world building/scenario but I tweaked it a bit and added my own lore :] It's all right there in the intro, you can skip the first part if you're uninterested in allat.

Listed sexual stuff: restraining, he should theoretically also use his tail for penetration because... mmh leave me alone, size difference (I made him 6'6, dragon genes go brrr), primal/prey, breeding
creator: Oririri
